biggest_findings: Arsenal is much broader than an agent builder: 91 routes, 57 edge functions, and 115 discovered table/storage names span agents, Business Spaces, AI routing, credits, marketplace, programs, partners, admin pages, and publishing.
Business Spaces are the clearest high-value B2B revenue surface because they connect pain point -> plan -> ROI -> proposal -> agents/automations -> outputs -> portal/export.
AI Route is a real control plane for admin key pools, tier defaults, model routes, usage limits, credits, fallbacks, and route events.
High-risk AI paths remain outside canonical ai-route, especially browser/BYO chat, direct image generation, dedicated experience generation, web search, and unknown knowledge retrieval paths.

The admin dashboard is a real business control plane, covering users, admins, flags, keys, providers, model routing, limits, usage, audit, credits, Business Spaces, operators, partners, pages, and content.

Revenue primitives are present: subscriptions, credit top-ups, Stripe webhooks, customer portal, paid Arsenal access, Stripe Connect, referral commissions, prompt packs, experiences, and Business Space gates.
Files/Vault should be marketed as proof, not storage, because it links generated work, replays, proposals, reports, and reusable deliverables.
Marketplace and creator monetization have many parts but need a clearer paid listing and payout journey before broad creator-economy marketing.
Feature sprawl is real. Labs, legacy routes, aliases, and advanced surfaces make Arsenal powerful but hard to explain without Atlas-style maps.
The selected production checkout was already dirty before audit; Atlas work stayed isolated, but future release checks should start from a clean source-of-truth checkout when possible.
top_marketable_features: Smart Solution Plan and ROI estimator
top_revenue_opportunities: Package Business Spaces as the flagship Pro/Premium B2B product with setup-fee and monthly service tiers.
Sell Smart Solution Plans as a lead-to-proposal engine for agencies and SMB operators.
Turn Night Shift into a premium automation/credits SKU after debit/refund tests are locked.
Use AI Route provider routing to protect margin and make credits predictable.
Launch paid Arsenals as productized bundles with paid access grants and creator payouts.
Make Files/Vault proof exports a sales deliverable for clients and agencies.
Create a first paid marketplace flow for prompt packs or agent templates before broad marketplace claims.
Bundle admin pages/client studio into done-for-you launch page and client portal services.
Use referral rewards and Stripe Connect to grow distribution without paid ads.
Position Experiences as paid interactive tools once entitlement/usage paths are tightened.

top_risks.description: Direct browser/BYO chat paths can bypass platform metering and admin policy.
top_risks.evidence: AiSystemsMap marks Chat / streaming completions as browser -> provider REST direct with high cost risk.
top_risks.impact: Credits, usage logs, and margin can drift.
top_risks.recommended_fix: Migrate remaining chat.agent.byo and agent.run paths into ai-route or document blessed exceptions with tests.

top_risks.description: Direct image generation via user keys is live but not platform metered.
top_risks.evidence: AiSystemsMap says LLMService.generateImage is direct provider REST with no usage logging.
top_risks.recommended_fix: Route platform-paid image generation through ai-route; label BYO as user-paid.

top_risks.description: Selected production checkout was already dirty before audit.
top_risks.evidence: Pre-audit git status listed modified/staged AI media/model files and untracked docs/tests/temp files.
top_risks.recommended_fix: Keep Atlas isolated; compare before/after status and diff fingerprints.

top_risks.description: Night Shift pricing/reserved/debited fields need full debit/refund verification before aggressive selling.
top_risks.evidence: business_space_night_shifts and AdminOperatorsPanel credit metrics exist.

top_risks.description: Flows and schedules can execute work but paid-tier/credit enforcement is not uniformly visible.
top_risks.impact: Free users may access costly execution or paid users may hit confusing limits.
top_risks.recommended_fix: Create canonical automation entitlement and credit contract.

top_risks.description: Channel execution is not fully unified under ai-route.
top_risks.evidence: ChannelRouting recommends migrating agent.run channel execution into ai-route.
top_risks.impact: Provider fallback and logs can diverge.
top_risks.recommended_fix: Make agent-runner use ai-route for all model calls.

top_risks.description: Embedding/retrieval provider and cost path are unknown.
top_risks.evidence: AiSystemsMap lists Knowledge retrieval / embeddings as Unknown.
top_risks.recommended_fix: Surface provider/model/logging/credit behavior in AI Systems Map.

top_risks.description: Web search/WebIntel provider, logging, and credit handling are not centrally enumerated.
top_risks.evidence: AiSystemsMap marks Web search / WebIntel Unknown.
top_risks.impact: Search costs and source trust unclear.
top_risks.recommended_fix: Map web-search provider/key/cost and admin visibility.

top_risks.description: Experience generation uses a dedicated route instead of canonical ai-route.
top_risks.evidence: services/experiences.ts invokes experience-generate; AdminExperiencesPanel controls OpenAI model.
top_risks.recommended_fix: Classify as blessed exception or migrate to ai-route route key.

top_risks.description: Marketplace/Discover exists but paid listing, commission, and entitlement loop needs clearer connection.
top_risks.evidence: Marketplace, prompt packs, Stripe Connect, referral tables exist separately.
top_risks.impact: Revenue loop is hard to sell.
top_risks.recommended_fix: Create one end-to-end paid asset flow.
